# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.upload.outputs.artifact-name }}
      build-version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build-sha: ${{ steps.version.outputs.sha }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Verify package integrity
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm audit --audit-level=high
          
      - name: Generate build version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d)-${GITHUB_SHA::8}
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "sha=${GITHUB_SHA}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "BUILD_VERSION=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build
          echo "${BUILD_VERSION}" > dist/version.txt
          echo "${GITHUB_SHA}" > dist/commit.txt
          
      - name: Generate SBOM
        run: |
          npm install -g @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm
          cyclonedx-npm --output-file dist/sbom.json
          
      - name: Create artifact manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${BUILD_VERSION}",
            "commit": "${GITHUB_SHA}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "workflow_run_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "workflow_run_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          find . -type f ! -name 'checksums.txt' -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.txt
          
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        id: upload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: |
            dist/**
            !dist/**/*.map
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
      
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: ./artifacts
          
      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          sha256sum -c checksums.txt
          
      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: './artifacts'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-results.sarif'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          
      - name: Verify SBOM
        run: |
          if [ ! -f artifacts/sbom.json ]; then
            echo "SBOM not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Check for secrets in artifacts
        run: |
          docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/artifacts:/scan trufflesecurity/trufflehog:latest filesystem /scan --no-update --fail

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan]
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: ./artifacts
          
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          sha256sum -c checksums.txt
          
      - name: Verify artifact manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' artifacts/manifest.json)
          if [ "$MANIFEST_SHA" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}" ]; then
            echo "Manifest SHA mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_STAGING_ROLE_ARN }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Staging-Deploy
          aws-region: us-east-1
          
      - name: Prepare deployment package
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          cp -r artifacts/* deployment/
          chmod -R 755 deployment
          find deployment -type f -name "*.sh" -exec chmod +x {} \;
          
      - name: Run pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/pre-deploy-checks.sh staging
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          
      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh staging deployment
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          AWS_REGION: us-east-1
          DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT: 600
          
      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-tests.sh staging
        env:
          STAGING_URL: https://staging.example.com
          
      - name: Create deployment record
        run: |
          cat > deployment-record.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "staging",
            "version": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}",
            "commit": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}",
            "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "deployed_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload deployment record
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-record-staging-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: deployment-record.json
          retention-days: 90

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, security-scan, deploy-staging]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
      
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: ./artifacts
          
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          sha256sum -c checksums.txt
          
      - name: Verify artifact manifest
        run: |
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' artifacts/manifest.json)
          MANIFEST_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' artifacts/manifest.json)
          
          if [ "$MANIFEST_SHA" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}" ]; then
            echo "Manifest SHA mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ "$MANIFEST_VERSION" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}" ]; then
            echo "Manifest version mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Download staging deployment record
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-record-staging-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: ./staging-record
          
      - name: Verify staging deployment
        run: |
          STAGING_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' staging-record/deployment-record.json)
          if [ "$STAGING_VERSION" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}" ]; then
            echo "Staging deployment version mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          
      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_PRODUCTION_ROLE_ARN }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-Production-Deploy
          aws-region: us-east-1
          
      - name: Prepare deployment package
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          cp -r artifacts/* deployment/
          chmod -R 755 deployment
          find deployment -type f -name "*.sh" -exec chmod +x {} \;
          
      - name: Create backup
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/backup.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          AWS_REGION: us-east-1
          
      - name: Run pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/pre-deploy-checks.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh production deployment
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          AWS_REGION: us-east-1
          DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT: 900
          ENABLE_CANARY: true
          CANARY_PERCENTAGE: 10
          
      - name: Monitor canary deployment
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/monitor-canary.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          MONITOR_DURATION: 300
          
      - name: Complete deployment
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/complete-deployment.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          
      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-tests.sh production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://production.example.com
          
      - name: Run integration tests
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/integration-tests.sh production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://production.example.com
          
      - name: Create deployment record
        run: |
          cat > deployment-record.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "production",
            "version": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}",
            "commit": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}",
            "deployed_at": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "deployed_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "staging_deployment_verified": true
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload deployment record
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-record-production-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}
          path: deployment-record.json
          retention-days: 365
          
      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment successful"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          
      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          bash scripts/deploy/rollback.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Old Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [deploy-production]
    if: always()
    permissions:
      actions: write
      
    steps:
      - name: Delete old artifacts
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const daysToKeep = 7;
            const cutoffDate = new Date();
            cutoffDate.setDate(cutoffDate.getDate() - daysToKeep);
            
            const artifacts = await github.rest.actions.listArtifactsForRepo({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              per_page: 100
            });
            
            for (const artifact of artifacts.data.artifacts) {
              const createdAt = new Date(artifact.created_at);
              if (createdAt < cutoffDate && artifact.name.startsWith('build-artifacts-')) {
                console.log(`Deleting artifact: ${artifact.name}`);
                await github.rest.actions.deleteArtifact({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  artifact_id: artifact.id
                });
              }
            }
